prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.9 kg; Height 168.3 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 6.5%; 3 months ago 6.0%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.2kg; 9 months ago 72.8kg; 6 months ago 73.8kg; 3 months ago 73.3kg; current 71.9kg), Height (12 months ago 168.3cm; 9 months ago 168.3cm; 6 months ago 168.3cm; 3 months ago 168.3cm; current 168.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 394mg/g; 9 months ago 504mg/g; 6 months ago 519mg/g; 3 months ago 513mg/g; current 451mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
